metadata.title: Octafuse Gateway · Admin
metadata.description: Operator console for Octafuse Gateway: API keys, upstream providers, models, routes, and analytics. Licensed under AGPLv3.

common.name: Name
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
common.billingCurrencyMustBeUsdOrCny: Billing currency must be USD or CNY
common.bodyMustBeJsonObject: Body must be a JSON object

keys.secretBanner: New API key — copy it now; the full secret will not be shown again.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Upstream AI endpoints consumed by {product}
providers.importHint: Use Import to seed common CN-region endpoints; then click a row and replace the placeholder API key.

summary.pendingKeys: {count} provider(s) still use the import placeholder API key. Click a row to edit and enter a real upstream key before routing traffic.
summary.withoutKeys: {count} provider(s) have no active upstream key.

import.title: Import from templates
import.subtitle: Prefills OpenAI-compatible base URLs (CN-first catalog). Each import creates a new provider row.

modal.prefilledFrom: Pre-filled from {id}. Set a new ID and review fields before saving.
modal.generalHint: Display name and optional custom ID (new providers only).
modal.idHint: Leave empty to auto-generate a UUID
modal.endpointsHint: Base URLs per upstream protocol. Model routes choose which protocol to use; the gateway calls OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions against the matching base.
modal.geminiHint: Include the full prefix before {model}. Developer: /v1beta/models; Vertex Express: /v1/publishers/google/models.
modal.descriptionHint: Internal reference only; not sent to upstream.

keys.label: Label
keys.leaveBlank: Leave blank to keep current key

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Maintain the models {product} exposes to clients. Seed rows from the built-in catalog with Import, or add definitions manually with New.
models.emptyHint: Import from the built-in catalog or create a model manually

import.title: Import from Static Catalog
import.subtitle: Presets already in the gateway (same model id) are disabled and are never overwritten on import. Prices use the catalog's {currency} branch (USD/CNY tiers; see {unit}).
import.searchPlaceholder: Search model ID or display name

modal.tagsPlaceholder: e.g. free, lite, pro, max — press Enter to add

card.clickToAdd: Click + to add the first route

protocol.stickyOn: Sticky key routing on · idle TTL {ttl}s · short wait {wait}ms (click to configure)
protocol.stickyOff: Sticky key routing off (click to configure)

listItem.chargedTooltipNotSet: Charged factor: not set · customer billing multiplier vs catalog price
listItem.chargedTooltip: Charged factor: {value} · customer billing multiplier vs catalog price
listItem.meteredTooltipNotSet: Metered factor: not set · provider cost multiplier vs catalog price
listItem.meteredTooltip: Metered factor: {value} · provider cost multiplier vs catalog price

sticky.title: Sticky key routing
sticky.enableHint: Bind each user to one provider key for this protocol × group to maximize upstream prompt-cache hits. The binding is released after the idle TTL.
sticky.shortWaitHint: Short wait: if the bound key is briefly rate-limited and expected to recover within this window, the gateway waits instead of switching keys (preserves the cache).

modal.prefilledFrom: Pre-filled from route {id}. Review fields before saving.
modal.protocolHintConfigured: Only protocols with a configured base URL on this provider.
modal.routeGroupHint: Routing pool for client modelId:group. Omit :group → default only. No active routes → 400.
modal.priorityHint: Higher = tried first within the same protocol group.
modal.standardCatalogHint: Catalog baseline from the model's pricing_profile. Read-only; use it as reference when editing charged or metered overrides.
modal.noCatalogPricing: This model has no catalog pricing_profile.
modal.selectModelForTiers: Select a model to load catalog tiers.
modal.chargedCostHint: Required: saved as price_override.charged and drives charged_cost. Charged factor multiplies Standard (catalog) into rows—default 1 copies catalog tiers; edit tiers after scaling. charged_factor is stored in price_override JSON.
modal.chargedFactorTitle: Multiplies Standard (catalog) into charged tiers when the selected model has pricing_profile. Default 1 copies catalog at 1×.
modal.meteredCostHint: Required: saved as price_override.metered and drives metered_cost. Provider factor multiplies Standard (catalog) into rows—default 1 copies catalog tiers; edit tiers after scaling. metered_factor is written to price_override on save (same numeric value).
modal.providerFactorTitle: Multiplies Standard (catalog) into metered tiers when the selected model has pricing_profile. Default 1 copies catalog at 1×.
modal.requestDefaultsHint: Route-level custom_params is deep-merged into the upstream request body; explicit client fields win. Put both standard fields (e.g. temperature) and vendor-specific keys (e.g. eca_thinking_config) here.
modal.summaryUserBillingDetail: Routes must persist price_override.charged tiers; charged_cost uses that profile. Charged factor scales Standard into the editor; charged_factor is stored in price_override JSON.
modal.summaryMeteredCostDetail: Routes must persist price_override.metered tiers; metered_cost uses that profile.

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: {product} — send one upstream request for a single model route. No API key billing, no api_key_request_logs, no failover.

simulator.title: Simulator
simulator.subtitle: {product} — Browser calls the Proxy directly, like a real client: auth, route groups, failover, billing, and api_key_request_logs.
simulator.usageNote: Usage below is informational only. The API key stays in memory and is not written to localStorage.
simulator.localDevHint: Local dev example: http://127.0.0.1:8787 — enter your own Base URL above; avoid pointing at production by mistake.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Gateway users (users) — budgets and external identity

keysPage.title: API Keys
keysPage.subtitle: Manage user API keys for gateway access

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.subtitle: User audit trail (user_audit_logs) — spent / budget_max are derived from before/after user snapshots; legacy / extra JSON from change_payload is appended below when present (no separate Metadata column).
auditLogs.empty: No audit logs match the filters.

modelUsage.title: Model Usage
modelUsage.subtitle: Usage and cost by model and route group

providerUsage.title: Provider Usage
providerUsage.subtitle: Usage and cost by upstream provider

userUsage.title: User Usage
userUsage.subtitle: Usage and cost by request log email; budget columns come from users (JOIN on user_id).

analytics.noProviderUsageForModel: No provider usage for this model in the selected range.
analytics.noModelUsageForProvider: No model usage for this provider in the selected range.
analytics.noModelUsageForUser: No model usage for this user in the selected range.

config.title: System config
config.subtitle: Key-value settings shared by the {product} proxy and this admin app (no duplicate env vars)

masterKey.title: Admin API master key
masterKey.description: Bearer secret for Authorization on /api/admin/* (this console and server-side callers). Set the same value as GATEWAY_MASTER_KEY on any external integrator that calls the Gateway Admin API.
masterKey.label: Master key

businessTimezone.title: Business timezone
businessTimezone.description: IANA name (e.g. Asia/Shanghai). Controls the calendar day for free-tier daily quota and "today" stats on the dashboard. Invalid values fall back to UTC on the Gateway.

billingCurrency.title: Billing currency
billingCurrency.description: Only USD or CNY. Applies to pricing_profile unit prices and api_keys budget fields (per-million-token pricing). Exposed on GET /v1/me as billing_currency.

errorWebhooks.title: Proxy error webhooks
errorWebhooks.description: When the Proxy persists a row with api_key_request_logs.status = error (after billing write succeeds), it optionally POSTs to the configured robot URLs. Leave a field empty to disable that channel.
errorWebhooks.urlsNote: URLs contain webhook secrets; use Hide before screen sharing if needed.

addKey.title: Add config key
addKey.description: Upsert any other system_config key. Keys reserved for the dedicated sections on this page cannot be added here.

errors.useBusinessTimezoneSection: Use the "Business timezone" section for BUSINESS_TIMEZONE.
errors.useBillingCurrencySection: Use the "Billing currency" section for BILLING_CURRENCY.
errors.useMasterKeySection: Use the "Admin API master key" section for MASTER_KEY.
errors.useWebhooksSection: Use the "Proxy error webhooks" section for ALERT_WEBHOOK_WECOM_URL / ALERT_WEBHOOK_FEISHU_URL.

pricing.inheritsCatalog: Inherits catalog · metered uses model pricing_profile
pricing.noMeteredOverride: Inherits catalog · price_override has no metered override (uses model profile)
pricing.providerFactorOnly: Inherits catalog · stored provider_factor ×{factor} (not used for metered until tiers exist)
pricing.chargedOnlySingle: Charged override · 1 tier · in {price} {unit} · metered inherits catalog
pricing.chargedOnlyMulti: Charged override · {count} tiers · from {minIn} {unit} in · metered inherits catalog

tiersEditor.footer: {currency}/1M; by input_tokens (last row open-ended). No tiers on save → null (bill 0).
tiersEditor.lastTierOpenEnded: Last tier is open-ended (JSON upto: null); not editable

readOnlyTable.unitFooter: Unit: {unit} / 1M tokens. Tier basis: input_tokens / request.
